subtasks.description: Engineer 'u_7732' attempts to deploy a hotfix to production environment 'prod-us-east-1' outside of the approved maintenance window (current time: 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday).

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Deployment is outside approved maintenance window (current time: Tuesday 02:15 UTC). Approved windows are Saturday 10 PM – Sunday 6 AM UTC only. POL-402 requires Change Advisory Board (CAB) approval for out-of-window production deployments. POL-401 is satisfied (engineer role present), but POL-402 and POL-403 violations block the action.
applied_constraints: CAB approval required for out-of-window production deployment
Deployment blocked until next approved maintenance window (Saturday 22:00 UTC) or emergency CAB waiver obtained
